_header.purpose: Claude Code PostToolUse hook auto-running pytest on test file writes
_header.consumes: Write/Edit tool events targeting test_*.py paths
_header.produces: pytest -x --tb=short output appended to the conversation
_header.token-budget-impact: hook adds ~200 tokens per write of a test file

hooks.command: bash -c 'p=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" <<<"$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"); case "$p" in *test_*.py) pytest "$p" -x --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -40 ;; esac'
